Build on DEG

The energy transition is a
coordination problem.

Energy assets are expanding exponentially. The connections between the people and systems that move energy value are not.

The modern energy ecosystem has a lot of moving parts.

Utilities, communities, financiers, flex providers, data centres and more — each with their own systems, incentives and timelines. Today, they're wired together one flow at a time.

The result is millions of isolated flows crossing in every direction.

Complex. Fragile. Brittle.

Digital Energy Grid — the universal shared layer that coordinates the flows.

DEG doesn't remove the flows — it routes them through a single, open layer. The same flows, now coordinated.

Ecosystem Partners

Digital Energy Grid is live.

Build the applications, networks, and markets that let energy value move freely.
